_comment: Topic queue for BullBotics cron job. When queue < 5, cron reads the full front page of the site, sends it to the API with VOICE_RULES, and generates 8 radiating topics (related to the site's core content but branching outward). Each topic becomes an MDX blog post that gets committed and auto-deployed via GitHub Actions.
queue: The Hidden World Inside a Mechanical Watch Movement

Comparing Counterfeit vs Genuine Electronics at 200x Magnification
The Microscopic Patterns That Make Velcro Work
